_meta.resume_note: Pinned to Napa Valley College's official 2025-2026 catalog. The Biology section lists only Natural Science AS and Pre-Health Science AS, so no general Biology/Biological Sciences AS-T, AS, or AA qualifies under the agreed scope.

none_found_sources.locator: PDF pages 92-94, complete Biology program section; degrees listed are Natural Science AS and Pre-Health Science AS only

notes: Natural Science AS and Pre-Health Science AS are adjacent interdisciplinary or pre-professional awards rather than general Biology/Biological Sciences awards, so both are excluded. The 2025-2026 catalog contains no Biology AS-T and no degree titled Biology or Biological Sciences.
